## Summary
Clear and concise description of the bug.

## Environment
- PickHome version: [e.g. 1.2.4 / Docker tag `n3ro88/pickhome:1.2.4` / `latest`]
- Deployment: [Docker / local `npm run dev` / other]
- Browser + OS: [e.g. Firefox 138 on Windows 11]
- Database: [fresh seed / migrated existing `data/pickhome.db`]

Please do not post passwords, session cookies, TOTP secrets, or full backup ZIPs.

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior
What should happen?

## Actual behavior
What happens instead?

## Screenshots / logs
If relevant, attach UI screenshots or redacted server logs.

Paste logs here (remove secrets)

## Additional context
Project ID, route, or role (user/admin) if it helps — use placeholders instead of real personal data when possible.
